hero.heading: One app to replace them all
hero.desc: Organize your work and life with Taskify. The most powerful task manager.

feature.heading: Delightfully simple and deceptively powerful task management
feature.desc: 30 million+ people organize billions of tasks in Todoist for their work, education, and personal life.
feature.f1_desc: Use Todoist's apps, extensions and widgets on any device or platform.
feature.f2_desc: Customize your to-do list with filters, labels, priorities, and more.
feature.f3_desc: Personal productivity recommendations based on your unique traits and strengths.
feature.f4_desc: Hundreds of templates are available to get you started with whatever's on your plate.
feature.f5_desc: Link Todoist with your calendar, voice assistant, and 30+ other tools.

achievements.title: A task manager you can trust for life
achievements.desc: We've been building Todoist for 15 years and 169 days. We're in it for the long haul.

footer.tagline: Simplify your life, one task at a time.

cookie_banner.message: We use cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to visit this site you agree to our use of cookies.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.introduction_text: Taskify is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our application.
privacy_policy.cookies_text: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our service and hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data that may include an anonymous unique identifier.
privacy_policy.essential_text: Required for the website to function properly, including authentication and security.
privacy_policy.functional_text: Enable enhanced functionality and personalization, such as language preferences.
privacy_policy.analytics_text: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous usage data.
privacy_policy.data_collection_text: We collect the following types of information:
privacy_policy.data_usage_text: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
privacy_policy.usage_service: To provide and maintain our service
privacy_policy.usage_improve: To improve and personalize your experience
privacy_policy.usage_communicate: To communicate with you about updates and support
privacy_policy.usage_security: To monitor usage and prevent fraud
privacy_policy.data_sharing_text: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share data with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website.
privacy_policy.data_security_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy_policy.your_rights_text: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy_policy.right_access: Right to access your personal data
privacy_policy.right_delete: Right to request deletion of your data
privacy_policy.cookie_management_text: You can manage your cookie preferences through the cookie banner on our website or by adjusting your browser settings to refuse cookies.
privacy_policy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the Last Updated date.
privacy_policy.contact_text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.
